stemHtml: Which of these statements about rudder pedal nose wheel steering is correct?

options.a: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering does not function during take-off.
options.b: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering functions on the ground only.
options.c: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering provides a larger deflection of the nose wheel as hand wheel steering (tiller).
options.d: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering provides the same deflection of the nose wheel as hand wheel steering (tiller) control.
